subject: DevOps
title: The OWASP Top Ten
description: A quick, practical guide to The OWASP Top Ten.

hook.text: What are the most common web app flaws? OWASP lists the top ten. They barely change over decades.

buildup.text: Injection, broken auth, data exposure — these classic flaws appear in millions of applications.

discovery.text: The 2021 list added insecure design and software integrity failures. OWASP updates every few years.

twist.text: Knowing the list isn't enough. Devs must understand each flaw and how to prevent it in their code.

climax.text: Many compliance frameworks reference the OWASP Top Ten. Fix these and you satisfy regulations too.

punchline.text: Start with the OWASP Top Ten. Fix common flaws first.

quiz.question: What is the purpose of the OWASP Top Ten?
options: Listing the most critical web application security risks
Ranking the top ten programming languages
